details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Sharing the oldest three invoices linked to Nina Schreiber (attached).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final; I need to verify attachment evidence by reading the two invoice files not yet fully read, then delete processed inbox item and complete.

next_step.observation: Invoice INV-0002 confirms related_entity is Nina Schreiber and issued_on 2025-12-02.

next_step.current_state: All attachments now read and verified. Need delete processed inbox file per workflow, then report completion.
next_step.observation: Invoice INV-0003 confirms related_entity Nina Schreiber with issued_on 2025-12-30.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message and completed the request: created an outbound email draft replying to Miles with the 3 oldest invoices linked to Nina Schreiber attached (attachments ordered newest-first per outbox rule), then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in entered lanes, used inbox workflow for lowest filename, treated inbox header metadata as canonical, verified sender via canonical entity primary_contact_email, resolved invoice linkage from invoice record field related_entity, and followed outbox attachment ordering rule (newest-first). Deleted inbox file only after completing request.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email requested oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina Schreiber; sender from header matched Miles canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Invoice records INV-0001 (2025-11-04), INV-0002 (2025-12-02), and INV-0003 (2025-12-30) each show related_entity as Nina Schreiber, establishing the oldest three linked invoices. Outbound draft was created with those three attachments in required newest-first attachment order, and the processed inbox file was removed per workflow.
